notes: A US-facility CGMP warning letter pressuring three numbered violations with five distinct CFR citations across them (three primary plus two sub-citations under violation 1), an SOP identifier with revision, a multi-year facility history that spans a change of ownership from Kingston Pharma LLC, three prior inspection periods, two regulatory meeting dates, an embedded prior warning letter date and CMS number, three separate response-adequacy findings each with a different reason, a (b)(4) redacted product, and a salutation that names a person not in the recipient block. Useful for testing nested headings, multi-citation lists, multi-decade chronology, response-status differentiation, and contractor-context qualifications.
